Toast / Alert

Floating toast notification overlays using <lyte-alert> Slyte DOM. Types: Info, Success, Warning, Error. Supports close button and configurable position (top-right, top-center, bottom-right, etc.).

Floating Figma Synced 6 Variants
Info Toast
Default
This is an informational message.
Long Text
Your changes have been saved. The system will process your request shortly and notify you once complete.
Lyte Alert
HTML
<!-- Pure HTML Toast -->
<div class="zc-toast zc-toast-info">
    <span class="zc-toast-icon"><!-- info svg --></span>
    <span class="zc-toast-message">This is an informational message.</span>
</div>

<!-- Lyte Alert -->
<lyte-alert lt-prop-show="true"
            lt-prop-type="info"
            lt-prop-message="Info message"
            class="zc-toast zc-toast-info">
</lyte-alert>
SCSS
.zc-toast-info {
    background: var(--zc-color-info-surface-info-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--zc-color-info-border-info-border-default, #0D4EF2);
    color: var(--zc-color-info-text-info-text-bold, #051F61);
    .zc-toast-icon { color: var(--zc-color-info-text-info-text-default, #0D4EF2); }
}
Success Toast
Default
Operation completed successfully!
Long Text
Your record has been saved successfully. All changes are now reflected in the database.
Lyte Alert
HTML
<div class="zc-toast zc-toast-success">
    <span class="zc-toast-icon"><!-- check svg --></span>
    <span class="zc-toast-message">Operation completed successfully!</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-toast-success {
    background: var(--zc-color-success-surface-success-surface-subtle, #F6FEF9);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
    color: var(--zc-color-success-text-success-text-bold, #033F1E);
    .zc-toast-icon { color: var(--zc-color-success-text-success-text-default, #078841); }
}
Warning Toast
Default
Please review your input before continuing.
Long Text
Your session is about to expire. Save your work to avoid losing changes.
Lyte Alert
HTML
<div class="zc-toast zc-toast-warning">
    <span class="zc-toast-icon"><!-- warning svg --></span>
    <span class="zc-toast-message">Please review your input.</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-toast-warning {
    background: var(--zc-color-warning-surface-warning-surface-subtle, #FFF9F5);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--zc-color-warning-border-warning-border-default, #D25704);
    color: var(--zc-color-warning-text-warning-text-bold, #642902);
    .zc-toast-icon { color: var(--zc-color-warning-text-warning-text-default, #D25704); }
}
Error Toast
Default
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Long Text
Failed to save your record. The server returned an unexpected error. Please retry or contact support.
Lyte Alert
HTML
<div class="zc-toast zc-toast-error">
    <span class="zc-toast-icon"><!-- error svg --></span>
    <span class="zc-toast-message">Something went wrong.</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-toast-error {
    background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
    color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-bold, #5F0A07);
    .zc-toast-icon { color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-default, #CC1914); }
}
Toast with Close Button
Info + Close
This is an info toast with a close button.
Success + Close
Record saved successfully!
Warning + Close
Session expiring soon!
Error + Close
Failed to delete record.
Lyte Close
HTML
<div class="zc-toast zc-toast-info">
    <span class="zc-toast-icon"><!-- icon --></span>
    <span class="zc-toast-message">Toast with close button.</span>
    <button class="zc-toast-close">
        <svg ...><!-- close X --></svg>
    </button>
</div>

<!-- Lyte: close button via lt-prop -->
<lyte-alert lt-prop-show="true"
            lt-prop-type="info"
            lt-prop-close-button="true"
            lt-prop-message="Closable toast."
            class="zc-toast zc-toast-info">
</lyte-alert>
SCSS
.zc-toast-close {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 4px;
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-s, 4px);
    color: inherit;
    opacity: 0.6;
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
    &:hover { opacity: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
}
Toast Positions
Top Right
Top Center
Top Left
Bottom Right
Bottom Center
Bottom Left
HTML
<!-- Wrap toasts in a positioned container -->
<div class="zc-toast-container zc-toast-top-right">
    <div class="zc-toast zc-toast-info">...</div>
</div>

<!-- Position classes: -->
<!-- zc-toast-top-right | zc-toast-top-center | zc-toast-top-left -->
<!-- zc-toast-bottom-right | zc-toast-bottom-center | zc-toast-bottom-left -->
SCSS
.zc-toast-container {
    position: fixed; z-index: 9999;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;
    &.zc-toast-top-right    { top: 20px; right: 20px; }
    &.zc-toast-top-center   { top: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
    &.zc-toast-top-left     { top: 20px; left: 20px; }
    &.zc-toast-bottom-right { bottom: 20px; right: 20px; }
    &.zc-toast-bottom-center{ bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
    &.zc-toast-bottom-left  { bottom: 20px; left: 20px; }
}
